zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland於1341年11月10日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，他的父親Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy21歲，母親Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster21歲。他於1358年7月12日與Margaret Neville在英國達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1402年登記服兵役。他於1399年被列為constable of england。他去世於1408年2月20日在英國越可爾布拉哈姆享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland于1341年11月10日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，他的父亲Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy21岁，母亲Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster21岁。他于1358年7月12日与Margaret Neville在英国達勒姆布朗加斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1402年登记服兵役。他于1399年被列为constable of england。他去世于1408年2月20日在英国越可爾布拉哈姆享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland was born on 10 November 1341, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, his father, Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy, was 21 and his mother, Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, was 21. He married Margaret Neville on 12 July 1358, in Brancepeth, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1402. In 1399, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as constable of england. He died on 20 February 1408, in Bramham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland est né le 10 novembre 1341, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Neville le 12 juillet 1358, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1402. En 1399, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england. Il est décédé le 20 février 1408, à Bramham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland am 10. November 1341 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy 21 und seine Mutter Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster 21. Er hat am 12. Juli 1358 in Brancepeth, Durham, England Margaret Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1402 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1399, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Februar 1408 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bramham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland è nato il il 10 novembre 1341 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Neville il 12 luglio 1358, nel Brancepeth, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1402. Nel 1399, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england. Morì il 20 febbraio 1408, nel Bramham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberlandが1341年11月10日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percyは21歳，母Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancasterは21歳であった。1358年7月12日にイギリスダルハムブランセペスでMargaret Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年に兵役登録をした。1399年，57歳の時，職業はconstable of englandと記録されている。彼は1408年2月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブラムハムで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland(이)가 1341년 11월 10일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1358년 7월 12일 영국 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Margaret Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1399년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of england이었다. 그는 1408년 2월 20일 영국 요르크실르 브램함에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

pt.September 1334: de 9 de setembro de 1334 a 8 de outubro de 1334
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1341, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Neville em 12 de julho de 1358, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1402. Em 1399, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of england. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1408, em Bramham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland родился 10 ноября 1341 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Neville 12 июля 1358 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1402 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1399 году, в возрасте 57 лет, работал по профессии constable of england. Он умер 20 февраля 1408 г. в местности брамхам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.10 November 1341–20 February 1408: 10 de noviembre de 1341–20 de febrero de 1408

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland nació el 10 de noviembre de 1341, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Neville el 12 de julio de 1358, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1402. En 1399, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of england. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1408, en Bramham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
